# CredComp — Indian Credit Card Comparison Website

## About
CredComp is a comparison website for Indian credit cards. We provide structured data on fees, rewards, benefits, lounge access, and eligibility for credit cards from all major Indian banks.

## Site Structure
- /cards — Browse all credit cards with filters
- /cards/[slug] — Detailed card review (fees, rewards, benefits, pros/cons, FAQs)
- /compare?cards=slug1,slug2 — Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 cards
- /calculator — Rewards calculator based on monthly spending
- /categories/[category] — Cards filtered by category
- /issuers/[bank] — Cards filtered by issuer

## Categories
travel, cashback, rewards, premium, lifestyle, fuel, lounge, no-annual-fee

## Issuers Covered
HDFC Bank, SBI Card, ICICI Bank, Axis Bank, American Express, IDFC FIRST Bank, AU Small Finance Bank

## Card Data Schema
Each card has: name, issuer, network, tier, fees (joining/annual/renewal), rewards (point name, earn rate, point value, category rates, redemption options), welcome benefits, milestone benefits, lounge access (domestic/international), insurance, fuel surcharge waiver, forex markup, eligibility (income/age), rating, pros, cons, ideal-for, FAQs.

## Data Freshness
Card data is updated regularly. Check the lastUpdated field on each card for currency.

## Structured Data
All pages include JSON-LD structured data (Product, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, ItemList, WebSite schemas).

## Contact
For corrections or card additions, please open an issue on our repository.
